projectInfo.name: Sephia
projectInfo.description: Advanced AI Assistant with Voice Synthesis and Multi-Modal Capabilities
projectInfo.author: Alexandra

1.0.0.title: Initial Stable Release
1.0.0.description: First stable release with comprehensive voice synthesis, memory optimization, and process management.
features: Comprehensive voice synthesis system with Bark TTS integration
Memory optimization and leak prevention mechanisms
Advanced process cleanup and shutdown management
Intelligent audio management with speech preservation
Enhanced AI response accuracy and context handling
Google Calendar and Apple Calendar integration
Google Drive integration for file management
External memory system for persistent conversations
Real-time chat interface with typing indicators
bugFixes: Fixed infinite rendering loops causing duplicate voice synthesis
Resolved memory leaks in audio element management
Fixed AI giving wrong responses due to complex context prompts
Prevented voice synthesis interruption during active speech
Fixed duplicate Aria identity issues in conversation memory
Improved error handling in voice services
Enhanced stability of Electron process management
technicalImprovements: Implemented global spoken message tracking to prevent duplicates
Added conservative audio interruption logic in BarkVoiceService
Optimized conversation memory with history limits
Improved service initialization and lazy loading
Added background service registration and cleanup

recentCommits.message: feat: enhance Google Drive integration with comprehensive file operations
fix: resolve weather detection for "my location [address]" pattern
fix: improve weather detection and location handling
fix: add missing methods to MemoryAdapter service
feat: implement comprehensive version control system
debug: add context debugging and prompt improvements
fix: resolve undefined variable scope in voice callback
feat: sync text display with voice playback timing
feat: consolidate storage architecture and fix memory issues
feat: add Google Drive OAuth setup utilities
